title: Plant
description: A named agent instance within a garden. Plants are context containers: they carry memory, skills, and knowledge loaded when a goal is dispatched to them. The garden presents as a single identity to the operator — plants are an internal concern.

name.description: The plant's identity within the garden. Unique. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, starting with a letter.

seed.description: The seed name this plant was commissioned from. It is persisted in meta.json for provenance, and seeded commissioning materializes plants/{name}/seed so a first blank-memory run can bootstrap from seeds/{seed-name}.md.

status.description: active: plant is available for goal dispatch. archived: plant is retired; goals will not be dispatched to it.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. When this plant was commissioned.

commissioned_by.description: Name of the agent or operator that commissioned this plant.

notes.description: Plants do not own goals or runs. Goals are dispatched to plants via the goal's assigned_to field. Runs reference their plant via the run's plant field. All goals and runs live at garden level.

context_loading.description: When a goal is dispatched to a plant, the driver always loads garden MOTIVATION.md. If memory/MEMORY.md exists and is non-blank, it also loads the plant's memory, skills, and knowledge. Otherwise, the driver may bootstrap from plants/{name}/seed by loading seeds/{seed-name}.md.
